texto: As if it were Injustice to sell dearer than we buy; or to give more to a man than he merits. The value of all things contracted for, is measured by the Appetite of the Contractors: and therefore the just value, is that which they be contented to give.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Thomas Hobbes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “As if it were Injustice to sell dearer than we buy; or to give more to a man than he merits. The …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, economics, fallacy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fallacy e free-market.
